top_signals.title: Shippers Wary of Red Sea Routes Despite Houthi Pledge to End Targeting
top_signals.summary: The world’s top three container operators said they fear instability in Gaza and broader regional tensions mean continued danger.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
top_signals.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Target Drops DEI Goals and Ends Program to Boost Black Suppliers
top_signals.summary: Once a stalwart supporter of Black and LGBTQ rights, the retailer joined corporate America’s retreat from DEI initiatives.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Palestinians Stream Back to Northern Gaza on Foot
top_signals.summary: Israel allowed displaced Gazans to begin crossing a military zone that bisects the enclave after a deadlock over hostage releases was broken.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
top_signals.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
top_signals.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
top_signals.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Freed Israeli Hostages Still Had Shrapnel in Their Bodies From Oct. 7 Attack
top_signals.summary: Some of the women were held alone for extended periods and spent eight months in tunnels, an Israeli medical official said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Suspected Sabotage of Deep-Sea Cable Triggers First NATO-Led Response
top_signals.summary: The alliance mounted its first coordinated response to a suspected sabotage campaign against critical infrastructure after another cable was severed in the Baltic Sea.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Leading China Property Developer Reports Huge loss, in Sign of Widening Real-Estate Woes
top_signals.summary: Troubles at Vanke raise questions about the continued spread of the property crisis and whether the Chinese state will step in.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
top_signals.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Building-Products Distributor QXO Launches Hostile Bid for Beacon
top_signals.summary: QXO is taking its offer directly to shareholders after being rebuffed on several occasions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

alerts.summary: The Canadian government said it would provide extraordinary financing to Canada Post to avoid insolvency at the state-owned mail service.

alerts.title: Amazon Willing to Discuss Quebec Shutdown With Canadian Officials
alerts.summary: Amazon.com said it is open to talks with officials from the Canadian and Quebec governments about the decision to shut down operations in the country’s French-speaking province, which would lead to 1,700 people losing their jobs.

alerts.title: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Enter Congo's Safe-Haven City
